text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon and I have come to watch the Arima
Kinen, and Nakayama Racecourse is teeming with
an unusually high level of excitement...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Coming through!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I'm fine. I just got bumped a little.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But look how many people are here today... It's a
struggle just to move around.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I should be used to it by now, but somehow the
Arima Kinen's popularity always impresses me.
choice_data_list: Well, it is the huge end-of-year race.
Well, it is the huge end-of-year race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all the year's top performers taking the
field, the Arima Kinen is the perfect way to cap
off a year of racing for many fans.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, until last year, I used to feel like the
concert after the Arima Kinen marked the end of
the year, too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But the Tokyo Daishoten is even closer to the end of the year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's also a huge end-of-year race. I wonder
if we could get all the people here to go there
too.
choice_data_list: This year will be even bigger than last year.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Even bigger...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're right! ☆ We even handed out all those
flyers, so this ye—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! Everyone's finally coming out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Those two look so elegant.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You can tell they're all laser-focused. This is
gonna be an awesome race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she predicted, the race turns into an epic
showdown sure to go down in history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd favorite, Daiwa Scarlet, leads the
pack. She sets the pace and fends off her frantic
pursuers, until...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We have a winner! Number thirteen, Daaaaiwaaa
Scaaaaarlet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on to shine as this year's queen of the
grand prix, besting the competition with
overwhelming strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Scarlet was super cool!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure we're going to feel that passion at the
winning concert too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! We need to get front-row
seats!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Duh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's dive in! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert is just as overwhelming, and
Smart Falcon and I watch from the front row.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for your support today,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm Daiwa Scarlet, the number one
Umamusume! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was intense!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Scarlet was really shining up there.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But that's not all. I could feel her almost, like,
commanding everyone to keep their eyes on her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: She had the entire audience under her spell.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The top runners really are in a league of their
own...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I can do it. I know I can.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make the Tokyo Daishoten a race to
remember, just like what we saw today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It'll be all right. I mean, dirt races are just as fun.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, we've done everything we possibly can. I
made my declaration and put tons of effort into
my performances...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So yeah... It's gonna be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds a bit like Smart Falcon is trying to
convince herself. But then, an instant later, her
eyes start beaming with hope.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The peak of the dirt world is right in front of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins our classic-year Tokyo Daishoten!
